title: Erucastrum longirostre
intro: Erucastrum longirostre, also known as long-beaked rocket, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, pain, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Erucastrum longirostre include isothiocyanates, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Erucastrum longirostre is often prepared as a tea or used as a tincture, and it is also sometimes combined with other herbs in formulas to enhance its therapeutic effects.

It belongs to the genus Erucastrum, which is a group of flowering plants. The species Erucastrum longirostre is closely related to other plants in the Brassicaceae family, such as wild mustard and charlock.
